channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Green Party leader Zack Polanski urges government to fund energy bill support and tighten windfall taxes amid Middle East conflict fallout
item.description: Green Party leader Zack Polanski is preparing to criticise Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer for failing to adequately shield households from anticipated sharp rises in energy bills when the current pri...

item.title: Republic of Congo Debt Hits 92% of GDP Following Eurobond Issue
item.description: As e dey now, Republic of Congo don see their public debt climb to 8,943.97 billion FCFA by the end of 2025, wey be about 92.46% of their GDP. Dis one na small rise from the 8,535.77 billion FCFA wey ...

item.title: Somali Representatives Sworn In as Members of East African Legislative Assembly After Court Ruling
item.description: Nine Members of Parliament from Somalia have officially joined the East African Legislative Assembly (EALA) after being sworn in during a special hybrid session held in Arusha. Their entry marks a mil...

item.title: Benin Council Suspends Officials Over Unauthorized Palace Visit by Influencer Peller
item.description: The Benin Traditional Council don drop serious disciplinary action on one palace chief, one queen, and some palace workers after one social media influencer, Habeeb Hamzat Adelaja wey people sabi as P...

item.title: Statistics Canada Reports Decline in Functional Health Among Young Canadians
item.description: A recent report from Statistics Canada has revealed that the functional health of Canadian adults has declined over the past decade, particularly among those under 35. Functional health, which measure...

item.title: Retired Defence Chief Reflects on Magufuli’s Legacy and Calls for Continuation of Development Projects
item.description: Chato – Retired Chief of Defence Forces, General Venance Mabeyo, has shared reflections on the life and leadership lessons of the late Dr John Pombe Magufuli during the fifth anniversary of his passin...

item.title: Trump criticises allies for not joining US military action in Iran as RBA warns of possible recession
item.description: US President Donald Trump has publicly criticised several of America’s allies, including Australia and members of NATO, for refusing to participate in the ongoing military campaign against Iran. Speak...

item.title: Partial Government Shutdown Causes TSA Staffing Shortages, Long Airport Lines, and Flight Disruptions Amid Political Impasse
item.description: A partial government shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security, now in its fourth week as of March 17, 2026, has left TSA workers without full pay since mid-February due to a congressional stale...

item.title: DVSA introduces new measures to improve fairness in driving test bookings
item.description: The Driver and Vehicle Standards Agency (DVSA) is implementing significant changes to the driving test booking system to prevent abuse and improve access for learners. From 31 March, learners will be ...

item.title: Controversy at Sydney Biennale as DJ Haram's speech sparks backlash
item.description: During the opening night of the Biennale of Sydney, Brooklyn-based musician DJ Haram, born Zubeyda Muzeyyen, delivered a pre-show speech that sparked significant controversy. The 53-year-old art event...

item.title: Team USA and Venezuela Set for World Baseball Classic Championship Game
item.description: Team USA is set to face Venezuela in the 2026 World Baseball Classic final at loanDepot Park in Miami, seeking its second championship in the international tournament. The U.S. team is making its thir...

item.title: Tanzanian Ambassador Urges Donors to Invest in Long-Term Development Projects
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Zena Ahmed Said, the Chief Secretary of Zanzibar and Tanzanian Ambassador-designate to Saudi Arabia, has made a call to donors, both local and international, to channel their assistanc...

item.title: Warner Bros CEO to Receive Nearly $1 Billion Amid Paramount Takeover
item.description: The CEO of Warner Bros, David Zaslav, is poised to earn over US$700 million (approximately AU$984 million) following the studio's acquisition by Paramount, which outbid Netflix in a US$83 billion deal...

item.title: Sergeant Fannie Nkosi rejects claims of alerting Cat Matlala before raid
item.description: Police sergeant Fannie Nkosi has denied allegations that he warned businessman Vusimusi 'Cat' Matlala of a planned police raid linked to the alleged kidnapping of Jerry Boshoga. Testifying before the ...

item.title: UAV Crashes into House in Rawalpindi's Chaklala Area, No Casualties Reported Amid Pak-Afghan Tensions
item.description: According to security sources, an unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) crashed onto a house in the Chaklala area of Rawalpindi early Tuesday morning on March 17, 2026. Thankfully, no loss of life occurred in...

item.title: Raphael Tuju Talks About His Marriage and Family Amid Property Dispute
item.description: Former Cabinet Secretary Raphael Tuju has recently opened up about his personal life and ongoing property issues. Tuju disclosed that after his first divorce, he married a Kalenjin woman, and together...

item.title: Zelensky warns UK parliamentarians of Russia-Iran alliance and urges sustained pressure on Moscow amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky addressed around 60 British MPs and peers in a Westminster committee room, describing the regimes in Russia and Iran as 'brothers in hatred' due to their coopera...

item.title: BJP Plans to Contest 89 of 126 Assembly Seats in Assam for 2026 Elections
item.description: For the upcoming Assam Assembly Elections in 2026, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has announced its plan to contest in 89 out of the total 126 assembly constituencies across the state. Himanta Biswa...

item.title: Trump criticises Starmer and European leaders over Iran conflict as US insists on acting alone
item.description: Donald Trump criticised UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer in a press conference, branding him 'disappointing' and asserting that he was 'no Churchill'. The US President expressed frustration with Europea...

item.title: Free State school launches anti-bullying drive after viral footage
item.description: Following the circulation of distressing videos on social media depicting pupils being bullied at Ntsu Secondary School in Bethlehem, the Dihlabeng Local Municipality has initiated an anti-bullying ca...
